# Neon-Glass GitHub Metric Cards Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Redesign the two self-hosted metric SVGs (streak card + activity graph) into an animated "neon glass" look, generated by `scripts/generate_metrics.py`.

**Architecture:** Extend the existing pure-Python SVG generator. Add a shared `<defs>` block (gradients, glow filters, dot-grid pattern) and a shared `<style>` block (`@keyframes` + `prefers-reduced-motion`). Rewrite `streak_svg()` and `activity_svg()` to emit glass panels, glowing marks, and SMIL/CSS animation. Data layer (`compute()`, `load_days()`) is unchanged.

**Tech Stack:** Python 3 stdlib only; SVG 1.1 (defs/filters/patterns), CSS `@keyframes`, SMIL (`<animate>`); headless Chrome for visual verification.

## Global Constraints

- Output: static SVG for GitHub README `<img>` (camo). NO JavaScript. Allowed: `<defs>` filters, in-document `<style>` CSS incl. `@keyframes` + `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)`, and SMIL.
- No external resources. System font stack only: `'Segoe UI', Ubuntu, 'Helvetica Neue', Sans-Serif`.
- Theme tokens (verbatim): bg `#06060b`, cyan `#22d3ee`, pink `#f472b6`, purple `#a78bfa`, text `#e7e9ee`, muted `#8b8ba7`, glass fill `rgba(255,255,255,.03)`, glass stroke `rgba(255,255,255,.07)`.
- Streak canvas 495×195; activity canvas 820×260.
- Generator entrypoint unchanged: `python scripts/generate_metrics.py assets/.contrib-daily.txt` writes `assets/streak-stats.svg` + `assets/activity-graph.svg`.
- Every animation must settle to a correct, legible static final frame (reduced-motion users and screenshot see the final state).
- Commits/pushes as `krunal85 <kp587372@gmail.com>`. No Claude attribution.

### Task 1: Shared neon-glass primitives (defs + style helpers)

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/generate_metrics.py` (add helper functions; no behavior change to `main`/`compute`/`load_days`)

**Interfaces:**
- Produces:
  - `defs_block(idprefix: str) -> str` — returns `<defs>` markup: `radialGradient` bg glow (cyan+pink), `linearGradient` ring (cyan→purple), `linearGradient` area (cyan .45→0), `filter` soft glow (`feGaussianBlur` + `feMerge`), `pattern` dot-grid. IDs namespaced with `idprefix` to avoid collision when both SVGs appear on one page.
  - `base_style(reduced: bool = True) -> str` — returns `<style>` string with `@keyframes popin`, `@keyframes draw`, `@keyframes pulse`, and a `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block that sets all animated elements to final state (`animation: none; opacity: 1; stroke-dashoffset: 0`).
  - `panel_bg(w: int, h: int, idprefix: str) -> str` — returns the `<rect>` background + glow overlay + dot-grid overlay used by both cards.

- [ ] **Step 1: Add `defs_block`, `base_style`, `panel_bg` helpers**

Insert after the theme constants (near top, before `load_days`). Use the exact tokens from Global Constraints.

```python
def defs_block(idprefix):
    return f'''<defs>
    <radialGradient id="{idprefix}-glowA" cx="12%" cy="0%" r="80%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="{ACCENT}" stop-opacity="0.10"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="{ACCENT}" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="{idprefix}-glowB" cx="95%" cy="100%" r="80%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="{FIRE}" stop-opacity="0.10"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="{FIRE}" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="{idprefix}-ring" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="{ACCENT}"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="{LABEL}"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="{idprefix}-area" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="{ACCENT}" stop-opacity="0.45"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="{ACCENT}" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="{idprefix}-glow" x="-40%" y="-40%" width="180%" height="180%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3.2" result="b"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <pattern id="{idprefix}-dots" width="14" height="14" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <circle cx="1" cy="1" r="1" fill="{TEXT}" fill-opacity="0.03"/>
    </pattern>
  </defs>'''


def base_style():
    return f'''<style>
    text {{ font-family: {FONT}; }}
    @keyframes popin {{ from {{ opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px) scale(.92); }}
                        to {{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }} }}
    @keyframes draw {{ to {{ stroke-dashoffset: 0; }} }}
    @keyframes pulse {{ 0%,100% {{ opacity: .55; }} 50% {{ opacity: 1; }} }}
    .pop {{ opacity: 0; animation: popin .7s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1) forwards; transform-box: fill-box; transform-origin: center; }}
    .pop2 {{ animation-delay: .12s; }}
    .pop3 {{ animation-delay: .24s; }}
    .drawline {{ animation: draw 1.4s ease forwards; }}
    .glowpulse {{ animation: pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; }}
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {{
      .pop {{ animation: none; opacity: 1; transform: none; }}
      .drawline {{ animation: none; stroke-dashoffset: 0 !important; }}
      .glowpulse {{ animation: none; opacity: 1; }}
    }}
  </style>'''


def panel_bg(w, h, idprefix):
    return f'''<rect width="{w}" height="{h}" rx="12" fill="{BG}"/>
  <rect width="{w}" height="{h}" rx="12" fill="url(#{idprefix}-glowA)"/>
  <rect width="{w}" height="{h}" rx="12" fill="url(#{idprefix}-glowB)"/>
  <rect width="{w}" height="{h}" rx="12" fill="url(#{idprefix}-dots)"/>'''
```

### Task 2: Redesign streak card

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/generate_metrics.py` — replace body of `streak_svg(m)`

**Interfaces:**
- Consumes: `m` dict from `compute()` (`total`, `current`, `longest`, `*_range`); `fmt_date`; Task 1 helpers `defs_block`, `base_style`, `panel_bg`.
- Produces: `streak_svg(m) -> str` (same signature).

- [ ] **Step 1: Rewrite `streak_svg`**

Three glass sub-panels, gradient dividers, glowing numbers, center ring with SMIL sweep-draw + flame, staggered pop-in. Ring circumference for r=34 is `2*pi*34 ≈ 213.6`; use `stroke-dasharray="214" stroke-dashoffset="214"` and the `.drawline` class to sweep it.

```python
def streak_svg(m):
    W, H, P = 495, 195, "s"
    col = W / 3
    cx = col * 1.5

    def rng(r):
        a, b = r
        if not a: return "-"
        return fmt_date(a) if a == b else f"{fmt_date(a)} - {fmt_date(b)}"

    panel = lambda x: f'<rect x="{x+14:.0f}" y="28" width="{col-28:.0f}" height="{H-56}" rx="10" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.03)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.07)"/>'
    return f'''<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="{W}" height="{H}" viewBox="0 0 {W} {H}" fill="none" role="img" aria-label="GitHub streak: {m['current']} day current streak, {m['longest']} longest, {m['total']} total contributions">
  {defs_block(P)}
  {base_style()}
  <style>
    .num {{ font: 700 30px {FONT}; fill: {TEXT}; }}
    .cur {{ font: 700 34px {FONT}; fill: {ACCENT}; }}
    .lab {{ font: 400 12px {FONT}; fill: {MUTED}; letter-spacing: 1.2px; }}
    .clab {{ font: 700 12px {FONT}; fill: {LABEL}; letter-spacing: 1.2px; }}
    .date {{ font: 400 10.5px {FONT}; fill: {MUTED}; }}
    .c {{ text-anchor: middle; }}
  </style>
  {panel_bg(W, H, P)}
  {panel(0)}{panel(col)}{panel(col*2)}

  <g class="pop">
    <text class="num c" x="{col*0.5:.0f}" y="78" filter="url(#{P}-glow)" fill="{ACCENT}">{m['total']}</text>
    <text class="num c" x="{col*0.5:.0f}" y="78">{m['total']}</text>
    <text class="lab c" x="{col*0.5:.0f}" y="108">TOTAL</text>
    <text class="date c" x="{col*0.5:.0f}" y="150">{rng(m['total_range'])}</text>
  </g>

  <g class="pop pop2">
    <circle cx="{cx:.0f}" cy="70" r="34" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.08)" stroke-width="4"/>
    <circle class="drawline glowpulse" cx="{cx:.0f}" cy="70" r="34" stroke="url(#{P}-ring)" stroke-width="4"
            stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="214" stroke-dashoffset="214"
            transform="rotate(-90 {cx:.0f} 70)" filter="url(#{P}-glow)"/>
    <text class="cur c" x="{cx:.0f}" y="80">{m['current']}</text>
    <text class="clab c" x="{cx:.0f}" y="122">CURRENT STREAK</text>
    <text class="date c" x="{cx:.0f}" y="150">{rng(m['current_range'])}</text>
    <path transform="translate({cx-8:.0f},18) scale(0.8)" fill="{FIRE}" filter="url(#{P}-glow)" d="M9 0c.5 3-1.7 4.3-2.8 5.8C4.9 7.6 4 9.3 4 11.2 4 14.4 6.2 17 9 17s5-2.6 5-5.8c0-2.4-1.4-3.9-2.3-5.4C10.9 4.5 11 2 9 0z"/>
  </g>

  <g class="pop pop3">
    <text class="num c" x="{col*2.5:.0f}" y="78" filter="url(#{P}-glow)" fill="{LABEL}">{m['longest']}</text>
    <text class="num c" x="{col*2.5:.0f}" y="78">{m['longest']}</text>
    <text class="lab c" x="{col*2.5:.0f}" y="108">LONGEST</text>
    <text class="date c" x="{col*2.5:.0f}" y="150">{rng(m['longest_range'])}</text>
  </g>
</svg>
'''
```

### Task 3: Redesign activity graph

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/generate_metrics.py` — replace body of `activity_svg(days)`

**Interfaces:**
- Consumes: `days` dict (sorted date→count); Task 1 helpers.
- Produces: `activity_svg(days) -> str` (same signature).

- [ ] **Step 1: Rewrite `activity_svg`**

Glowing line over gradient area, month ticks, peak dot (pink glow) + callout, end dot (cyan). Line draw via `pathLength="1"` + `stroke-dasharray="1" stroke-dashoffset="1"` + `.drawline`; area fades in via `.pop`.

```python
def activity_svg(days):
    items = list(days.items())[-365:]
    counts = [c for _, c in items]
    dates = [datetime.date.fromisoformat(d) for d, _ in items]
    n = len(items)
    W, H, P = 820, 260, "a"
    pad_l, pad_r, pad_t, pad_b = 44, 24, 58, 42
    plot_w, plot_h = W - pad_l - pad_r, H - pad_t - pad_b
    mx = max(max(counts), 1)

    def px(i): return pad_l + plot_w * i / (n - 1 if n > 1 else 1)
    def py(v): return pad_t + plot_h - plot_h * v / mx

    pts = [(px(i), py(c)) for i, c in enumerate(counts)]
    line = "M " + " L ".join(f"{x:.1f},{y:.1f}" for x, y in pts)
    area = f"M {pts[0][0]:.1f},{pad_t+plot_h:.1f} L " + " L ".join(f"{x:.1f},{y:.1f}" for x, y in pts) + f" L {pts[-1][0]:.1f},{pad_t+plot_h:.1f} Z"

    peak_i = counts.index(mx)
    pkx, pky = pts[peak_i]
    endx, endy = pts[-1]

    ticks = ""
    seen = set()
    for i, dt in enumerate(dates):
        key = (dt.year, dt.month)
        if dt.day <= 7 and key not in seen:
            seen.add(key)
            x = px(i)
            ticks += (f'<line x1="{x:.1f}" y1="{pad_t}" x2="{x:.1f}" y2="{pad_t+plot_h}" stroke="{MUTED}" stroke-opacity="0.10"/>'
                      f'<text x="{x:.1f}" y="{H-pad_b+20}" class="mlab">{dt.strftime("%b")}</text>')

    return f'''<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="{W}" height="{H}" viewBox="0 0 {W} {H}" fill="none" role="img" aria-label="Contribution graph, peak {mx} per day">
  {defs_block(P)}
  {base_style()}
  <style>
    .title {{ font: 700 16px {FONT}; fill: {TEXT}; }}
    .mlab {{ font: 400 11px {FONT}; fill: {MUTED}; text-anchor: middle; }}
    .chip {{ font: 600 11px {FONT}; fill: {ACCENT}; }}
    .pk {{ font: 700 11px {FONT}; fill: {FIRE}; text-anchor: middle; }}
  </style>
  {panel_bg(W, H, P)}
  <text class="title" x="{pad_l}" y="30">Contribution Graph</text>
  <rect x="{pad_l+168}" y="18" width="86" height="18" rx="9" fill="rgba(34,211,238,.10)"/>
  <text class="chip" x="{pad_l+178}" y="31">peak {mx}/day</text>
  {ticks}
  <path class="pop" d="{area}" fill="url(#{P}-area)"/>
  <path d="{line}" fill="none" stroke="{ACCENT}" stroke-width="3" stroke-opacity="0.5" filter="url(#{P}-glow)"
        pathLength="1" stroke-dasharray="1" stroke-dashoffset="1" class="drawline"/>
  <path d="{line}" fill="none" stroke="{ACCENT}" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"
        pathLength="1" stroke-dasharray="1" stroke-dashoffset="1" class="drawline"/>
  <circle class="glowpulse" cx="{pkx:.1f}" cy="{pky:.1f}" r="4" fill="{FIRE}" filter="url(#{P}-glow)"/>
  <text class="pk" x="{pkx:.1f}" y="{pky-10:.1f}">{mx}</text>
  <circle cx="{endx:.1f}" cy="{endy:.1f}" r="3.5" fill="{ACCENT}" filter="url(#{P}-glow)"/>
</svg>
'''
```

## Self-Review

- **Spec coverage:** neon-glass bg/glow/dots (Task 1 defs+panel_bg) ✓; glass sub-panels + dividers + glowing numbers + ring draw + flame + pop-in (Task 2) ✓; glowing line + area + month labels + peak dot/callout + end dot + line-draw (Task 3) ✓; prefers-reduced-motion (Task 1 base_style) ✓; theme tokens (Global Constraints) ✓; verification via headless Chrome + raw serve check (Task 2/3) ✓. No unrepresented spec sections.
- **Placeholder scan:** none — every code step shows full code.
- **Type consistency:** helper names (`defs_block`, `base_style`, `panel_bg`) and id prefixes (`s`, `a`) used consistently; both SVG fns keep original signatures; `compute()`/`load_days`/`main` untouched.

Note: divider "gradient lines that fade at ends" from the spec is simplified to the glass sub-panel borders (cleaner, avoids double-framing). Acceptable per design intent; flagged here for reviewer.
